title: Junior SEO Specialist at ID Fresh Food

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at ID Fresh Food
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, ID Fresh Food in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
